title: Damage=Item
description: When you take damage, you receive a random item. The more damage you take, the more items you receive.
body:
# Description
If you take damage, a random item will be granted to you. The more damage you take, the more items you’ll receive.

# Commands
```
/gamerule allowCrafting <true/false>
```
This command disables/enables crafting.

```
/gamerule dropItemsOnBlockBreak <true/false>
```
This command disables/enables item drops when you break a block.

# Languages
- English
- German

Do you speak another language? I’d be happy if you sent me a translation.
